## Acceptance criteria for the research output

- [ ] Written report at `docs/research/<slug>.md` covering the question
- [ ] Recommendation section: 🟢 green-light / 🟡 yellow-light / 🔴 red-light for the follow-up issue
- [ ] Reproduction scripts at `tests/research/<slug>/` if applicable
- [ ] Linked from the follow-up implementation issue
